recommendations.title: Gremlins
recommendations.overview: After receiving an exotic small animal as a Christmas gift, a young man inadvertently breaks three important rules concerning his new pet, which unleashes a horde of malevolently mischievous creatures on a small town.

recommendations.title: Small Soldiers
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Action
recommendations.overview: When missile technology is used to enhance toy action figures, the toys soon begin to take their battle programming too seriously.

recommendations.title: The Howling
recommendations.overview: After a bizarre and near fatal encounter with a serial killer, a newswoman is sent to a rehabilitation center whose inhabitants may not be what they seem.

recommendations.title: Piranha
recommendations.overview: When flesh-eating piranhas are accidentally released into a summer resort's rivers, the guests become their next meal.

recommendations.title: Matinee
recommendations.overview: A showman introduces a small coastal town to a unique movie experience and capitalizes on the Cuban Missile crisis hysteria with a kitschy horror extravaganza combining film effects, stage props and actors in rubber suits in this salute to the B-movi

recommendations.title: Innerspace
recommendations.overview: Test pilot Tuck Pendleton volunteers to test a special vessel for a miniaturization experiment. Accidentally injected into a neurotic hypochondriac, Jack Putter, Tuck must convince Jack to find his ex-girlfriend, Lydia Maxwell, to help him extract Tu

recommendations.title: Burying the Ex
recommendations.overview: Before horror enthusiast Max can break things off with his girlfriend Evelyn she dies in a bus accident. In time, Max meets another woman only to have Evelyn resurface as a zombie ready to resume their relationship.

recommendations.title: The 'Burbs
recommendations.overview: When secretive new neighbors move in next door, suburbanite Ray Peterson and his friends let their paranoia get the best of them as they start to suspect the newcomers of evildoings and commence an investigation. But it's hardly how Ray, who much pre

recommendations.title: Twilight Zone: The Movie
recommendations.overview: An anthology film presenting remakes of three episodes from the "Twilight Zone" TV series—"Kick the Can", "It's a Good Life" and "Nightmare at 20,000 Feet"—and one original story, "Time Out."
recommendations.director: George Miller, Steven Spielberg, John Landis, Joe Dante

recommendations.title: Amazon Women on the Moon
recommendations.overview: Centered on a television station which features a 1950s-style sci-fi movie interspersed with a series of wild commercials, wacky shorts and weird specials, this lampoon of contemporary life and pop culture skewers some of the silliest spectacles ever
recommendations.director: Robert K. Weiss, Joe Dante, Peter Horton, Carl Gottlieb, John Landis
